messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>太空射击游戏</title>
    <style>
        body { margin: 0; background: #0f0f1a; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; }
        canvas { 
            width: 360px; height: 640px; 
            max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
<script>
    const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    canvas.width = 360;
    canvas.height = 640;

    let state = 'menu'; // menu, playing, gameover
    let score = 0;
    let highScore = localStorage.getItem('spaceShooterHighScore') || 0;
    let player = { x: 170, y: 550, w: 40, h: 40, speed: 5 };
    let bullets = [];
    let enemies = [];
    let frameCount = 0;

    function handleInput(key, pressed) {
        if (state === 'menu' && key === 'Enter') state = 'playing';
        if (state === 'gameover' && key === 'Enter') {
            score = 0; bullets = []; enemies = []; state = 'playing';
        }
        if (state === 'playing') {
            if (key === 'ArrowLeft') player.x = Math.max(0, player.x - 20);
            if (key === 'ArrowRight') player.x = Math.min(320, player.x + 20);
            if (key === ' ') bullets.push({ x: player.x + 18, y: player.y, w: 4, h: 10 });
        }
    }

    window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => handleInput(e.key, true));

    function update(deltaTime) {
        if (state !== 'playing') return;
        
        frameCount++;
        if (frameCount % 30 === 0) enemies.push({ x: Math.random() * 320, y: -40, w: 30, h: 30, speed: 2 + score / 500 });

        bullets.forEach((b, i) => {
            b.y -= 7;
            if (b.y < 0) bullets.splice(i, 1);
        });

        enemies.forEach((e, i) => {
            e.y += e.speed;
            if (e.y > 640) { state = 'gameover'; if(score > highScore) { highScore = score; localStorage.setItem('spaceShooterHighScore', score); } }
            bullets.forEach((b, bi) => {
                if (b.x < e.x + e.w && b.x + b.w > e.x && b.y < e.y + e.h && b.y + b.h > e.y) {
                    enemies.splice(i, 1); bullets.splice(bi, 1); score += 10;
                }
            });
        });
    }

    function render() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 360, 640);
        
        if (state === 'menu') {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white'; ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('按回车键开始游戏', 180, 320);
        } else if (state === 'playing' || state === 'gameover') {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5'; ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.w, player.h);
            bullets.forEach(b => { ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'; ctx.fillRect(b.x, b.y, b.w, b.h); });
            ctx.fillStyle = '#f56565';
            enemies.forEach(e => ctx.fillRect(e.x, e.y, e.w, e.h));
            
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white'; ctx.font = '20px Arial';
            ctx.fillText(`得分: `, 160, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5'; ctx.fillText(score, 210, 30);
        }

        if (state === 'gameover') {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white'; ctx.fillText('游戏结束', 180, 300);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, 180, 340);
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(() => { update(); render(); });
    }

    render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
